heading: Purpose
label: 5001 Purpose
text: It is the purpose of this chapter to implement the Convention for the Conservation of Anadromous Stocks in the North Pacific Ocean, signed in Moscow, .February 11, 1992
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title VIII of , which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of title VIII to the Code, see Short Title note below and Tables.Pub. L. 102–567
CodificationTitle VIII of and enacted identical sections. Title VIII of was repealed by .Pub. L. 102–567Pub. L. 102–587Pub. L. 102–587Pub. L. 106–562

Short Title, , , which provided that title VIII of , which enacted this chapter and repealed sections 1021 to 1023, 1025 to 1027, 1029, 1030, and 1032 to 1035 of this title and provisions set out as notes under , could be cited as the “North Pacific Anadromous Stocks Convention Act of 1992”, was repealed by , , .Pub.
